eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN ADMINISTRATIVE MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Maricopa, AZ; at 10:35 PM on JUN 30, 2026 Effective until 6:35 AM JUL 1, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: A SAFE Alert has been issued for Peoria Police Department. This is the Arizona Department of Public Safety. Peoria Police Department is looking for 32-year-old male Dylan Kirby. He is 5" 8" tall, 160 pounds with black hair, brown eyes, and last seen on foot wearing a white shirt and red shorts. He suffers from a medical condition and may become disoriented or easily confused. If you have contact with this SAFE Alert, please call 911. Monitor TV and Radio for updates.
